name: ilias-client
description: Inofficial client library for fetching data from ILIAS instances

scripts.generate-types: bunx tsc -d -m esnext -t esnext --outDir ./dist/types -p tsconfig.json --allowImportingTsExtensions false --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false
scripts.build-lib: rm -rf ./dist && mkdir -p ./dist/types && bun run generate-types && bun run bundle-lib

author: thatmarcel <contact@thatmarcel.com>
